scene.message: White Girl: Wh-who are you?{waitkey}{ret}
White Girl: ...{wait_fr:60}wh{waitkey}{ret}
White Girl: Waaaaaah!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Hey, don't cry.{nl} You're Mai-chan, aren't you?{waitkey}{ret}
White Girl: Hic...{nl} {wait_fr:94}mm-hm...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: ...! {wait_fr:60}She's got a{nl} half-moon compact!{waitkey}It looks just like mine...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: What do you mean?!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: No way!{wait_fr:94}{nl} That can't be...{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: The creator of a{nl} world, a child this small...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Seriously?!{nl} Gimme that, Ayase wants it!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Mai-chan...{nl} you mustn't run away.{waitkey}{ret}
Mai: Sniff... sob...{nl} why not?{waitkey}{ret}
Isn't it safe if I hide?{nl} {ctl0e:13}{ret}
Mai: Sob... why?{waitkey}{ret}
Why do you fight, mister?{nl} {ctl0e:14}{ret}
Mai: Already...{wait_fr:88} dead?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Why, you ask...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Uh...{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: ...{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Why...{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: ...That's heavy.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: ...What a downer.{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{waitkey}{ret}
Mai: Why, mister?{waitkey}{ret}
Why do you live?{nl} {ctl0e:15}{ret}
Mark: This is going nowhere!!{nl} C'mon, please lend it!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Still say no, and I'll{nl} spank your butt?{waitkey}{ret}
Mai: Mr. Bear, help me!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Yahoo!{nl} Now, what should I wish for?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Now you're talking!{nl} Um, what should I wish for!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: ...slump...{nl} Guess it never is that easy.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Nothing for it.{nl} Let's head back to the castle.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Boo hoo~{nl} And I had so many wishes...{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{wait_fr:60}You've got{nl} quite a mouth on you...{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Aw~ what a shame.{nl} And I had so many wishes...{waitkey}{ret}
{ret}
It's locked.{waitkey}
